# Action UI Metadata

Action UI Metadata copy-first generated block.

Generated from ../agent-native/packages/core/src/action-ui.ts (@agent-native/core@0.79.19).

## Copy instructions

Run `pnpm --dir catalog/blocks/action-ui test` and `pnpm --dir catalog/blocks/action-ui typecheck`, then copy the files under `src/` into your app.

## Caveats

- Only stores renderer metadata; it does not provide renderer components.

## When not to use

- Do not use as a UI component library; pair with shadcn for actual UI.
